name: people-directory-spfx
description: SPFx People Directory Web Part - Converted from HTML/CSS/JS

scripts.package-solution: echo "In a real SPFx environment, run 'gulp package-solution'"
scripts.install-spfx: echo "To use with SPFx toolchain, install Node.js 18.17.1 and run 'npm install -g @microsoft/generator-sharepoint'"

spfxInfo.note: This project demonstrates the SPFx conversion. For actual SPFx deployment, use Node.js 18.17.1 with @microsoft/generator-sharepoint
